channel.title: Pierre Duchet-Suchaux on LMI
channel.description: Recent content in Pierre Duchet-Suchaux on LMI

item.title: Liquid-Liquid Equilibria of Binary, Ternary, and Quaternary SystemsInvolving Monoethylene Glycol, Water, Toluene, p-Xylene, Hexane, andOctane
Liquid-Liquid Equilibria of Binary and Ternary Systems Methanol/Waterplus n-Hexane, plus n-Octane, plus n-Dodecane, and plus n-Hexadecane inthe Temperature Range between T=283.15 K and T=333.15 K
Liquid-liquid equilibria of binary and ternary systems involvingmonoethyleneglycol, water, n-alkanes at three temperatures: 283.15,303.15 and 333.15 K
